note: lap 3 - Yair Montiel overtakes Grigor Georgiev for p4
Montiel dives up the inside of Georgiev, taking the fourth position!
intro: The roar of engines fills the air,The racers prepare for a challenge so rare.Today is the iFormula League at Red Bull Ring's Grand Prix track,The competitors will have to bring their best back-to-back.The clock starts at 15:00 with HEAT 1,It's time to show the world who'll come out and have all the fun!

note: lap 4 - Grigor Georgiev overtakes Yair Montiel for p4
Grigor Georgiev powers past Yair Montiel for fourth place on this lap!
lap 5 - Troy Banks looses several positions:
Troy Banks has been caught out - dropping several places in the standings on this lap!
lap 7 - Yair Montiel. Troy Banks overtakes Yair Montiel for p4
Troy Banks makes a daring move and slides past Yair Montiel, grabbing 4th place!
lap 10 - Grigor Georgiev looses several positions: pitted
Grigor Georgiev has just been bamboozled, he drops a couple of places after this pit stop!
lap 11 - Yair Montiel looses several positions: pitted, off track
Montiel is in trouble! He's gone off track and into the pits, losing several places in the process!
lap 22 - Nicholas Antonenko makes a pit stop. Troy Banks overtakes Nicholas Antonenko for p2
Troy Banks roars past Nicholas Antonenko on lap 22, seizing the pole position with a lightning-fast move!
lap 22 - Alexander Schanna has an off track moment and makes a pit stop. Frank Bieser overtakes Alexander Schanna for p6
Alexander Schanna's off-track detour forces him to take a pit stop, allowing Frank Bieser to zip by and snatch up sixth place!
lap 23 - Frank Bieser has an off track moment. Alexander Schanna overtakes Frank Bieser for p6
Frank Bieser has a moment of misfortune and Alexander Schanna capitalizes on the opportunity, overtaking him for sixth place!
lap 25 - Troy Banks looses several positions: pitted
Oh no, Troy Banks is in trouble! He has slipped down a few positions and is now into the pitlane - what a dramatic turn of events!
lap 26 - Grigor Georgiev overtakes Nicholas Antonenko for p2
Grigor Georgiev powers past Antonenko into second!
lap 26 - Frank Bieser overtakes Alexander Schanna for p6
Frank Bieser powers through with a daring move to snatch the 6th position away from Alexander Schanna!
lap 27 - Nicholas Antonenko has an off track moment. Troy Banks overtakes Nicholas Antonenko for p3
Troy Banks zooms past Nicholas Antonenko and into p3! It looks like there was an off track moment for Antonenko.
lap 28 - Frank Bieser makes a pit stop. Alexander Schanna overtakes Frank Bieser for p6
Alexander Schanna powers past Frank Bieser in a daring overtake to take sixth position!
lap 36 - Troy Banks overtakes Grigor Georgiev for p2
Troy Banks storms from the back of the pack and takes the position from Grigor Georgiev, muscling his way into second place!
lap 36 - Alexander Schanna overtakes Maximilian Thiele for p5
Alexander Schanna powers past Maximilian Thiele to snatch fifth place!
lap 35 - Nicholas Antonenko finishes in p4
Nicholas Antonenko powers to fourth place in an amazing performance on lap 35!
lap 36 - Gianluca Illiano finishes in p1
Gianluca Illiano takes the checkered flag with an impressive performance on lap 36!
lap 35 - Maximilian Thiele finishes in p5
Maximilian Thiele powers across the line in fifth place!
lap 35 - Alexander Schanna finishes in p6
Alexander Schanna crosses the finish line in a hard-fought 6th position, showing his driving skills with some impressive maneuvering around the track!
lap 36 - Troy Banks finishes in p2
Troy Banks powers into second place on the final lap; this could be an exciting finish!
lap 36 - Grigor Georgiev finishes in p3
Grigor Georgiev rounds the final corner and claims an impressive 3rd place finish!
lap 34 - Frank Bieser finishes in p7
Frank Bieser slips through the pack and takes a hard-earned seventh spot in the closing stages!
